Gold_Ore.description: Gold ore returned from the depths of Icarus.
Gold_Ore.flavorText: In the future, Icarus\'s natural wealth offers many intriguing possibilities.

Glass.description: Despite its imperfections, a workable sheet of glass.
Glass.flavorText: Reflected in a sheet of glass is a simple fact: What looks familiar, is in fact a crystalline lattice unlike anything on Earth.

Gunpowder.description: Creating and solving problems for over one thousand years.
Gunpowder.flavorText: \'Not the best we could do, but not the worst either\' - Sol Berlinski

Ghillie_Head.description: Lightweight camouflage, reduces visibility to wildlife, but gives little protection or warmth.
Ghillie_Head.flavorText: Take the effort out of hunting.

Ghillie_Chest.description: Lightweight camouflage, reduces visibility to wildlife, but gives little protection or warmth.
Ghillie_Chest.flavorText: Take the effort out of hunting.

Ghillie_Feet.description: Lightweight camouflage, reduces visibility to wildlife, but gives little protection or warmth.
Ghillie_Feet.flavorText: Take the effort out of hunting.

Ghillie_Arms.description: Lightweight camouflage, reduces visibility to wildlife, but gives little protection or warmth.
Ghillie_Arms.flavorText: Take the effort out of hunting.

Ghillie_Legs.description: Lightweight camouflage, reduces visibility to wildlife, but gives little protection or warmth.
Ghillie_Legs.flavorText: Take the effort out of hunting.

Glass_Bottle_Beer.flavorText: Looks perfectly capable of storing numerous liquids.

Glass_Bottle_Wine.flavorText: Looks perfectly capable of storing numerous liquids.

Glass_Beam.description: Anchors structures to the ground for higher building.
Glass_Beam.flavorText: Beams connect vertically and diagonally to support multi-level construction. Your HUD will indicate when beams are anchored with a blue cursor.

Glass_Wall.description: A fully transparent, mullioned wall section.
Glass_Wall.flavorText: Throw no stones, but hold \'R\' to cycle through variants, such as doorways. Mysteriously, can be repaired with a repair hammer.

Glass_Halfpiece.description: Half- and quarter-sized building elements for detailed construction work.
Glass_Halfpiece.flavorText: These sets are useful for creating walkways, balconies, trims and a range of other smaller constructions.

Glass_Half_Pitch.flavorText: A two part construction element, containing a base slope and an upper slope, for building low-pitched roofs.

Glass_Wall_Angle.description: Angular inserts for gables and other tilted designs.

Glass_Ramp.description: A transparent roof piece or ramp.
Glass_Ramp.flavorText: Able to be repaired with a repair hammer.

Glass_Roof_Corner.description: A transparent insert for angled roofs.

Glassworking_Bench.description: Tools for creating glass items and construction elements.
Glassworking_Bench.flavorText: True glass-making originated in the Indus Valley in 1700 BCE, passing into the Mediterranean, then Africa and the rest of the world, before extending through space to Icarus in the mid 22nd century.

Glassworking_Bench_V2.description: Tools for creating glass items and construction elements.
Glassworking_Bench_V2.flavorText: True glass-making originated in the Indus Valley in 1700 BCE, passing into the Mediterranean, then Africa and the rest of the world, before extending through space to Icarus in the mid 22nd century.

Glass_Jar.description: A roughly made, but perfectly serviceable mason jar.
Glass_Jar.flavorText: This jar is empty, but like the many gaps in our understanding of this planet, is waiting to be filled.

Glass_Jar_Jam.flavorText: It\'s not just jam. You hold in your hand an irreducible symbol of humanity\'s commitment to settling an alien world. Strongly increases max stamina.

GreenTea.description: Unprocessed leaves from a variant of the common tea tree.

Giant_Steak.description: A giant steak from the belly of only the largest creatures.
Giant_Steak.flavorText: This should keep you going for a while

Giant_Steak_Cooked.description: A prime cut from the larger beasts

Giant_Steak_Dried.description: A large dried piece of meat

Gamey_Meat.description: Raw gamey meat, typically found amongst the more passive wildlife

Gamey_Meat_Cooked.description: A reasonably well cooked piece of meat

Gamey_Meat_Dried.description: A plain piece of dried meat

Gold_Ore_Lure.description: A luxurious lure carefully crafted out of gold, to attract more fish.
Gold_Ore_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Gorse_Flower_Lure.description: A delicate lure carefully crafted out of flowers, to attract more fish.
Gorse_Flower_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Gold_Wire.description: This wire can be used in Electrical Circuits

Geode_Lamp_Cut_Copper.description: A gorgeous raw geode lamp for your home.
Geode_Lamp_Cut_Copper.flavorText: Bringing light, and style to your home on Icarus.

Geode_Lamp_Cut_Gold.description: A gorgeous raw geode lamp for your home.
Geode_Lamp_Cut_Gold.flavorText: Bringing light, and style to your home on Icarus.

Geode_Lamp_Cut_Oxite.description: A gorgeous raw geode lamp for your home.
Geode_Lamp_Cut_Oxite.flavorText: Bringing light, and style to your home on Icarus.

Geode_Lamp_Burst_Copper.description: A gorgeous cluster geode lamp for your home.

Geode_Lamp_Rock_Copper.description: A gorgeous rough geode lamp for your home.

Geode_Lamp_Rock_Gold.description: A gorgeous rough geode lamp for your home.
Geode_Lamp_Rock_Gold.flavorText: Bringing light, and style to your home on Icarus.

Geode_Lamp_Rock_Oxite.description: A gorgeous rough geode lamp for your home.
Geode_Lamp_Rock_Oxite.flavorText: Bringing light, and style to your home on Icarus.

Grilled_Saltwater_Fillet.description: Recently filleted fish grilled over an open fire.

Grilled_Freshwater_Fillet.description: Recently filleted fish grilled over an open fire.

Green_Tea_Seed.description: Can be planted in a Dirt Mound or Crop Plot.

Green_Tea_Seed_Pack.description: Can be planted in a Dirt Mound or Crop Plot.

Gold_Ore_Stack_100.description: Gold ore returned from the depths of Icarus.
Gold_Ore_Stack_100.flavorText: In the future, Icarus\'s natural wealth offers many intriguing possibilities.

Gold_Bed.description: A gilded bed that embodies the sleek, decorative essence of traditional Art Deco design.
Gold_Bed.flavorText: Art Deco is a decorative art and architectural style characterized by bold geometric patterns, and sleek lines which emerged in the 1920s and 30s on Earth.

Glass_Jar_Honey.description: A handy way to store your honey.

Glass_Bottle.flavorText: Looks perfectly capable of storing numerous liquids.

Great_Hunt_Device.description: A Communications Device Provided by Norex to Track down Apex Creatures in the World.
Great_Hunt_Device.flavorText: The Norex Operations Verification Assembly - Your one stop shop for everything black market.

Glass_Beam_Tempered.description: Anchors structures to the ground for higher building.
Glass_Beam_Tempered.flavorText: Beams connect vertically and diagonally to support multi-level construction. Your HUD will indicate when beams are anchored with a blue cursor.

Glass_Door_Reinforced.flavorText: Like the basic glass, but tougher.

Guano.description: Excrement of some bat-like creatures in Icarus, very rich in Nitrogen and Phosphorus.
Guano.flavorText: Surely there is a use for this.

GH_Ape_LaboratoryNote_1.description: A note written by someone. Right click to read.
GH_Ape_LaboratoryNote_1.flavorText: Someone really needs to improve their handwriting.

Gas_Fireplace.description: A biofuel powered fireplace, suitable for both basic cooking and heating.
Gas_Fireplace.flavorText: On Icarus, fire is both friend and foe.

Gas_Fireplace_Ext.description: Wide metal tubing helps the smoke escape the hearth.
Gas_Fireplace_Ext.flavorText: \'Sometimes it felt like I had joined a rustic interior decoration cult\' - M. Le Baroni

Gas_Fireplace_Cap.description: Vents and extractor fans help clear up any smoke from your shoddily cooked meals.

GH_Ape_O1_Note.flavorText: Someone really needs to improve their handwriting.
